proposed_relations.description: University Place Shared Street at the intersection with the 14th Street TTP corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: University Place is a Shared Street. Advisory Speed Limit: 5mph. Must turn right again at 13th Street

proposed_relations.description: University Place Shared Street depicted on the 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot map

evidence_refs.source_quote: University Place is a Shared Street. Advisory Speed Limit: 5mph. Must turn right again at 13th Street

rationale: University Place Shared Street is depicted on the 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority trifold map. Block p001_c0007 explicitly describes it as a Shared Street within this TTP document context, connecting it to the corridor and pilot project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: University Place is a Shared Street. Advisory Speed Limit: 5mph. Must turn right again at 13th Street

quarantine.note: Treatment is on University Place, not on the 14th Street corridor. Corridor limits are 14th Street between 3rd/9th Avenues; University Place is an intersecting cross street, not the corridor itself. For the project relation, the cited block text (p001_c0007) only states 'University Place is a Shared Street' with advisory speed and turn rules — it does not state the shared street is part of or implemented by the 14th Street TTP pilot project. Appearing on the same map is co-occurrence in a document, not a relation. Additionally, 'shared_street' is a fundamentally different treatment type from the transit & truck priority project scope.
